title: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh

chapter: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
text: Aen gezyi baez daengxhoih neix cungdenj cungjgez gij cwngzciu hab geiq haeuj lizsij、gij bengwz hab geiq haeuj lizsij nem gij gingniemh moq laeng gij saehnieb Dangj caeuq guekgya seizdaih moq, cujyau dwg ngeix daengz, doiq gij lizsij Dangj raeuz youq duenh aen minzcuj cujyi gwzming moq、duenh guh sevei cujyi gwzming caeuq gensez、duenh Baez Sam Cungh Daengxhoih Gaiq Cib’it aen Dangj daengz Baez Roek Cungh Daengxhoih Gaiq Cib’it aen Dangj, song aen lizsij gezyi gaxgonq neix gaenq guh hidungj cungjgez gvaq; doiq gij cwngzciu caeuq gingniemh duenh moq gaijgwz hailangh caeuq sevei cujyi yendaiva gensez, Dangjcunghyangh youq mwh Baez Sam Cungh Daengxhoih Gaiq Cib’it aen Dangj ciuhai ngeihcib hopbi、samcib hopbi cungj guh nyinhcaen cungjgez gvaq, gou youq gwnz Aen Daihhoih Angqhoh Gaijgwz Hailangh Seiqcib Hopbi fatbiuj gangjvah, hix guh hidungj cungjgez gvaq.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Aen Fap Fuengz Yw Binghlah Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Aen Fap Fuengz Yw Binghlah Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz
text: Diuz seiqcib ngeih Mwh binghlah fwtfat、 banhlah，yienhgaep doxhwnj deihfueng yinzminz cwngfuj wngdang sikhaek diuhdoengh gak fuengmienh， ciuq aen yawh’anq yawhfuengz、 gaemhanh bae guh fuengz yw， gatduenh diuz roen cienzboq binghlah， danghnaeuz miz bizyau, bauq hawj caemhcaiq ginggvaq gaepgwnz yinzminz cwngfuj gietdingh， miz gienz hengzguh gij cosih gaenjgip lajneix caemhcaiq goengbouh okdaeuj： It Hanhhaed roxnaeuz dingzdaengx guh haw、 youq ndaw yingjyen giyen yienjheiq caeuq gak yiengh vueddoengh miz vunzlai gyonjcomz haenx； Ngeih Dingzgoeng、 dingznieb、 mbouj hwnjdangz； Sam Fungsaek giz goekraemx vunzlai caez gwn yungh de、 roxnaeuz yocangz gijgwn caeuq gij doxgaiq deng goekbingh uqlah haenx； Seiq Gaemhgyaeng roxnaeuz gaebgaj doenghduz ndaw ndoeng ndaw ranz deng dawzraq haenx； Haj Fungsaek giz dieg aiq hawj binghlah banhsanq haenx.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: Gak gaep lingjdauj ganbu daegbied dwg gauhgiz ganbu aeu genhciz laeb dangj vih vunzlai、 gaemgienz vih beksingq, genhciz goeng sei faenmingz、 sien goenggya caiq bonjfaenh、 haed gij seisim swhgeij vih vunzlai, daiqdaeuz baujciz gij cozfungh giemhaw、 siujsim、 mbouj ndaenggon、 mbouj simgaenj, baujciz gij cozfungh mbouj lau sinhoj haenqrengz buek guh, daiqdaeuz caephengz gij cunjcwz cinghseuq gag haed, gagrox caeuq daeggienz swhsiengj caeuq daeggienz yienhsiengq guh doucwngh, mbouj cinj leihyungh gienzlig vih swhgeij caeuq bouxwnq maeuzaeu leih’ik seivunz, gimqcij veizfanj caizgingh cidu bae hawj cienz bae hawj doxgaiq bae hawj hanghmoeg, gimqcij yungh gak cungj gyaijbak roxnaeuz luenh laeb mingzmoeg ciemqaeu、 saisaengq gij cienzhuq guekgya caeuq cizdij, gimqcij veizfanj gvidingh daezsang ganbu daiyi biucinj.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: Daih 2 diuz Ndaw dangj gamduk aeu Majgwzswh Lezningz Cujyi、 Mauz Cwzdungh Swhsiengj、 Dwng Siujbingz Lijlun、 “Sam Aen Daibyauj”Cung’yau Swhsiengj、Gohyoz Fazcanjgvanh daeuj ceijyinx, haeujlaeg gvancez gij cingsaenz Siz Ginbingz cungjsuhgi baenzroix gangjvah youqgaenj, hopheux dungjcouz doicaenh “haj yiengh gyoebbaenz aen cingjdaej ndeu” cungjdaej baijbouh caeuq hezdiuz doicaenh “seiq aen cienzmienh” canloz baijbouh, gingqcungh dangjcangh, ciuq fapgvi ceih dangj, genhciz ndaw dangj gamduk caeuq daengxcungq yinzminz gamduk dox giethab, demgiengz gij naengzlig dangj raeuz youq laj diuzgen ciengzgeiz gaemgienz gag cinghseuq、 gag laebndei、 gag gaijmoq、gag daezsang, saedbauj dangj raeuz itcig cungj baenz aen cungsim giengiengz lingjdauj gij saehnieb yiengh sevei cujyi miz Cungguek daegsaek.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
text: Gij giekdaej yienghneix dwg ceiq baengh ndaej.” 1981 nienz, Baez Roek Cungh Daengxhoih Gaiq Cib’it aen Dangj doenggvaq le《Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Daj Laeb Guek Doxdaeuj Geij Aen Lizsij Vwndiz Aen Dangj》, dauqyawj le gij lizsij aen Dangj Cungguek moq laebbaenz gaxgonq, cungjgez le gij lizsij gingniemh sevei cujyi gwzming caeuq gensez, bingzgyaq le mbangj saehgienh hungnaek caeuq mbangj bouxvunz youqgaenj, daegbied dwg cingqdeng bingzgyaq le Mauz Cwzdungh dungzci caeuq Mauz Cwzdungh Swhsiengj, faencing le deng loek, niujcingq le gij gvanhdenj loengloek “swix” gvaz song fuengmienh neix, doengjit le gij swhsiengj daengx Dangj, doiq doinyoengx Dangj doxgiet itheij yawj baenaj、engq ndei doihaeuj gaijgwz hailangh caeuq hwnqguh yiengh sevei cujyi yendaiva miz yingjyangj hungnaek.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Aen Fap Fuengz Yw Binghlah Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Aen Fap Fuengz Yw Binghlah Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz
text: Diuz caetcib Aen gihgou sou lwed gung lwed mbouj ciuq gvidingh baugau yizcingz binghlah, roxnaeuz yomuenz、 gyajbauq、nguhbauq gij yizcingz binghlah, roxnaeuz mbouj caephengz guekgya mizgven gvidingh, fatseng gij saeh aenvih dwk lwed haeuj ndang deng bingh doenggvaq lwed cienzlah ne, youz yienhgaep doxhwnj yinzminz cwngfuj veiswngh hingzcwng bumwnz minghlingh gaijcingq, doengbauq baebingz, gingjgauq de; cauhdawz binghlah cienzboq、 banhlah roxnaeuz miz yiengh hougoj yiemzcungh wnq ne, doiq bouxcawjguenj rap miz cwzyin caeuq boux miz cwzyin cigsoh de， ciuqfap guh yiengh cawqfaen gyangqgaep、 siubae cizvu、 haicawz, caemhcaiq ndaej ciuqfap diuqsiu mbaw cingq cinjhawj caepnieb aen gihgou sou lwed gung lwed de; danghnaeuz cauxbaenz famhcoih, ciuqfap cazdawz hingzsaeh cwzyin.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
text: Youq gwnz giekdaej cienzmienh dauqyawj cungjgez gij ginglig caeuq cwngzciu hungloet Dangj raeuz buekguh bak bi, daj engq lai fuengmienh bae yawj, cungjgez gij eiqngeih lizsij Dangj raeuz buekguh bak bi, couh dwg Dangj raeuz buekguh bak bi daj goekgaen bae gaijbienq le gij roennaj minghyinh yinzminz Cungguek、hai ok le diuz roenloh cingqdeng guhbaenz Cunghvaz Minzcuz fukhwng hungmbwk、hawj vunz yawjraen Majgwzswh cujyi caen akrengz dahraix、laegdaeuq yingjyangj daengz lizsij seiqgyaiq baenaj、diz baenz yiengh Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj byaij youq baizgonq seizdaih，lwnhgangj Dangj raeuz gij gunghawj ndaej geiq haeuj lizsij vih yinzminz Cungguek、vih Cunghvaz Minzcuz、vih Majgwzswh cujyi、vih gij saehnieb baenaj vunzloih、vih hwnqguh aen cwngdangj Majgwzswh cujyi guh ok haenx.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
text: Gak dieg gak bouhmonz gak fuengmienh cungj nyinhnaeuz, bak bi daeuj, Dangj raeuz comzgiet daiqlingx yinzminz youq gwzming、gensez、gaijgwz gak aen lizsij seizgeiz neix lienzdaemh haenqrengz bae guh, cauh’ok le gij saeh gig mbouj bingzciengz ndaej ciengzlwenx geiq haeuj gij lizsij Cunghvaz Minzcuz hwngfat、gij lizsij seiqgyaiq sevei cujyi hwngfat、gij lizsij aen biengz vunzloih hwngfat, daengzdaej gaijbienq le diuz roen lizsij baenaj Cunghvaz Minzcuz daj ciuhgyawj doxdaeuj, sengdoengh sij ok le bien faenzcieng gyaeundei gwnz lizsij seiqgyaiq sevei cujyi hwngfat, hai baenz le gij ginggai moq Majgwzswh cujyi, vih guhbaenz Cunghvaz Minzcuz fukhwng hungmbwk laebhwnj le gij goenglauz saehnieb ciengzlwenx louz youq, vih coihawj vunzloih baenaj guh ok le gunghawj hungnaek.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: Daj gij cingzgvang hoizfuk de daeuj yawj, gak digih gak bouhmonz gak fuengmienh cungfaen haengjdingh aen gauj cunjcwz caeuq aen gauj diuzlaeh, nyinhnaeuz song aen vwnzgengauj neix cienzmienh gvancez gij cingsaenz dangj raeuz Cibbet Daih caeuq Cibbet Gaiq Sam Cung、 Seiq Cung、 Haj Cung Cienzhoih, aeu ciuqei dangjcangh guh gaenbonj, haeujlaeg cungjgez gij lizsij gingniemh aen dangj gensez, cigsoh mienhdoiq gij mauzdun caeuq vwndiz doedyienh ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz miz haenx, hopheux yiemzsuk ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz daezok gij iugouz mingzbeg doekdingh de, hopheux gyagiengz ndaw dangj gamduk guh ok gvidingh ciengzsaeq, vih laj hingzseiq moq gyagiengz caeuq gveihfan ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz、 gyagiengz ndaw dangj gamduk daezhawj le gij ciuqei gaenbonj de.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
text: Daj gij yigen naeuzdauq de daeuj yawj, gak dieg gak bouhmonz gak fuengmienh cungj nyinhnaeuz, Dangjcunghyangh gietdingh doenggvaq ciuhai Baez Roek Cungh Daengxhoih Gaiq Cibgouj, cienzmienh cungjgez gij cwngzciu hungnaek caeuq gingniemh lizsij Dangj raeuz buekguh bak bi, dwg baez gezcwz youqgaenj ndaej haicauh lizsij、nangqdaengz daengxbuenz haenx, cungfaen yienh’ok Dangj raeuz miz eiqceiq maenh’ak laebsim rapmaenh diuz rap dawznduj、ciengzlwenx bauj hawj Dangj raeuz miz rengzhoengh, cungfaen yienh’ok Dangj raeuz laegdaeuq gaemdawz le gij gvilwd lizsij fazcanj、itcig gagrox rapdawz diuz rap hwngfat gij saehnieb Dangj caeuq guekgya, cungfaen yienh’ok Dangj raeuz ndaej youq seizneix ngeix daengz coglaeng、yawjnaek cungjgez caeuq yinhyungh gij gingniemh lizsij.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: Daengx dangj itdingh aeu giengiet henhoh diuz gihbwnj lohsienq dangj raeuz, doiq gij gangjvah caeuq hengzdoengh foujdingh dangj raeuz lingjdauj、 foujdingh seveicujyi cidu guek raeuz、 foujdingh gaijgwz hailangh, doiq gij gangjvah caeuq hengzdoengh mbitmbeuj、 coujva、 foujdingh yiengh seveicujyi miz Cungguek daegsaek, doiq gij gangjvah caeuq hengzdoengh mbitmbeuj、 coujva、 foujdingh gij lizsij dangj raeuz、 gij lizsij Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz、 gij lizsij yinzminz ginhdui, doiq gij gangjvah caeuq hengzdoengh mbitmbeuj、 coujva、 foujdingh bouxdaeuz dangj raeuz caeuq yinghyungz mozfan, doiq sojmiz doenghgij gangjvah caeuq hengzdoengh boihfamh、 mbitmbeuj、 foujdingh gij gihbwnj lohsienq dangj raeuz, itdingh aeu lizcangz singjsak bae fanjdoiq caeuq daeqceih de.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
text: Dangjcunghyangh nyinhnaeuz, youq mwh lizsij youqgaenj Dangj raeuz laebbaenz it bak hopbi, youq aen lizsij gvanhdouz hungnaek Dangj raeuz caeuq yinzminz guh ndaej baenz aen moegbiu buekguh bak bi daih’it、cienzmienh hwnqbaenz aen biengz siujgangh, cingqcaih byaij haeuj aen moegbiu buekguh bak bi daihngeih cienzmienh hwnqbaenz aen guekak sevei cujyi yendaiva neix，cienzmienh cungjgez gij cwngzciu hungnaek caeuq gingniemh lizsij Dangj raeuz buekguh bak bi, doiq doinyoengx daengx Dangj caenh’itbouh doengjit swhsiengj、doengjit eiqceiq、doengjit hengzdoengh, comzgiet daiqlingx daengx guek gak cuz yinzminz guh ndaej gij hungmbwk moq yiengh sevei cujyi miz gij daegsaek Cungguek seizdaih moq, miz gij eiqngeih seizneix hungnaek caeuq gij eiqngeih lizsij gyaeraez.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Aen Fap Fuengz Yw Binghlah Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Aen Fap Fuengz Yw Binghlah Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz
text: Aen yawh’anq fuengzre、 gaemhanh binghlah wngdang baudaengz doenghgij cujyau neiyungz lajneix： It Aen cijveihbu fuengzre gaemhanh binghlah baenzlawz gapbaenz caeuq gij cizcwz doengh aen bouhmonz mizgven； Ngeih Gij cidu gamcaek、 soucomz saenqsik、 faensik、 baugau、 doengbauq binghlah； Sam Aen gihgou fuengzre gaemhanh baenzbingh、 aen gihgou ywbingh youq mwh fatseng binghlah yizcingz miz maz yinvu caeuq cizcwz； Seiq Doiq binghlah sawqmwh fatseng、 banhlah cingzgvang guhlawz faen gaep caeuq miz aen gunghcoz fueng’anq wngqgip doxwngq； Haj Fuengzre binghlah、 yienhciengz guenjhaed diegbinghraq gizbinghraq， baenzlawz rombwh caeuq diuhyungh gij sezsih、 sezbei、gij yw gouqmingh caeuq gij gaiqdawz wngqgip、 gij doxgaiq wnq caeuq gij gisuz aeu yungh de.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: Dangj raeuz Cibbet Daih doxdaeuj, raeuz gaemndaet cienzmienh coengzyiemz ceih dangj mbouj cuengq, yungh baenzloix guhfap moq bae gyarengz guenj dangj ceih dangj, genhciz niujcingq fungheiq dawzyiemz gijliz、 ndaw rog giem ceih, yiemzmingz cwngci gijliz caeuq cwngci gvigawj, genhgez naenxhaed aen seiqdaeuz nduknaeuh banhraih, roengzrengz cauhlaeb aen dijci gihci mbouj gamj bienq vaih、 mbouj ndaej bienq vaih、 mbouj siengj bienq vaih haenx, cug caengz doeksaed gij cawjdaej cwzyin caeuq gamduk cwzyin cienzmienh coengzyiemz ceih dangj, roengzrengz gaijgez gij vwndiz doedyienh ndaw dangj miz haenx, ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz miz ok haujlai heiqsiengq moq, ndaw dangj cwngci swnghdai cienj ndei yienhda, daengx dangj daengx biengz nyinhdoengz gig sang.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: Lumjbaenz, aen gauj cunjcwz daih’it bouhfaenh couh giengzdiuh, laj hingzseiq moq gyagiengz caeuq gveihfan ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz, cungdenj dwg gak gaep lingjdauj gihgvanh caeuq lingjdauj ganbu, ceiq youqgaenj dwg gauhgiz ganbu daegbied dwg gij vunz gapbaenz Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei、 Cunghyangh Cwngcigiz、 Cunghyangh Cwngcigiz Cangzvu Veijyenzvei, gauhgiz ganbu daegbied dwg gij vunz gapbaenz caengz lingjdauj cunghyangh de bietdingh aeu daiqdaeuz guh yiengh ndei, guh yiengh ndei ciuqsouj dangjcangh dangjgveih, yiemzsouj gij cwngci gijliz caeuq cwngci gvigawj dangj raeuz, genhciz mbouj lumz simnyienh codaeuz、 laebdaeb baenaj, daiqdaeuz guh yiengh ndei、 aeu baihgwnz daiqdoengh baihlaj, guh ok yiengh ndei hawj daengx dangj daengx biengz hag.

text: Cienzhoih haucauh, daengx dangj dungzci gaenjmaed doxgiet youq seiqhenz aen dangj cunghyangh aeu Siz Ginbingz dungzci guh haedsim haenx, cienzmienh haeujlaeg gvancez gij cingsaenz baez cienzhoih neix, laeb maenh cwngci eiqsik、 daihbuenz eiqsik、 haedsim eiqsik、 gaen hwnj eiqsik, giendingh mbouj bienq bae henhoh gij gienzvi dangj cunghyangh caeuq dangj cunghyangh cizcungh doengjit lingjdauj, laebdaeb doicaenh cienzmienh coengzyiemz ceih dangj, doengzcaez cauh ok yiengh cwngci swnghdai rumz seuq heiq cingq, saedbauj dangj raeuz comzgiet daiqlingx yinzminz mboujduenh haicauh aen gizmen moq seveicujyi saehnieb miz Cungguek daegsaek.

text: Cienzhoih giengzdiuh, gij yinvu ndaw dangj gamduk dwg saedbauj dangjcangh dangjgveih dangjgij ndaej youq daengx dangj mizyauq caephengz, henhoh aen dangj doxgiet doengjit, cungdenj gaijgez gij vwndiz aen dangj lingjdauj bienq nyieg、 aen dangj gensez giepnoix、 cienzmienh coengzyiemz ceih dangj mbouj rengz, gvanhnen aen dangj bienq damh、 cujciz nyaihsanq、 gijliz soengrungq, guenj dangj ceih dangj soengrwnh fwngzunq, baujcwng dangj cujciz ndaej cungfaen hengzguh ciznwngz、 fazveih haedsim cozyung, baujcwng daengxcungq dangjyenz fazveih senhfungh mozfan cozyung, baujcwng gij lingjdauj ganbu aen dangj cungcig cinghseuq dangnyaemh.

text: Neix dwg dangj caeuq guekgya cwngci swnghhoz ndawde gienh saeh hung ndeu, daengx dangj aeu cienzmienh gvancez gij cingsaenz Cibbet Daih caeuq Cibbet Gaiq Sam Cung、 Seiq Cung、 Haj Cung、 Roek Cung cienzhoih, doxgiet daiqlingx daengx guek gak cuz yinzminz, giendingh saenqsim, haenqrengz buekguh, caenh’itbouh guh ndei gak hangh hongsaeh dangj caeuq guekgya, daegbied dwg aeu cietsaed guh ndei gij hong swhsiengj lijlun caepcawq、 gij hong cujciz caepcawq、 gij hong ginghci sevei fazcanj、 gij hong eiqsik hingzdai, cietsaed henhoh sevei huzndei onjdingh, aeu gij cingzcik daegbied maenhndei bae ciepcoux dangj raeuz ciuhai Cibgouj Daih.

text: Cieng Daihseiq Gaemhanh Yizcingz Diuz samcib gouj Aen gihgou ywbingh mwh raen miz binghlah gyaploih， wngdang gibseiz ciuq gij guhfap lajneix bae cawqleix： It Hawj bouxbingh、 boux raek goekbingh gekliz ywbingh， gekliz geizhanh youz yihyoz genjcaz gezgoj gietdingh； Ngeih Mwh boux deng ngeiz mboujcaengz doekdingh dawz binghlah， aeu youq giz dieg ceijdingh de dandog gekliz ywbingh； Sam Bouxlawz caeuq doengh boux dawz binghlah、 boux raek goekbingh、 boux deng ngeiz dawz binghlah ndaw yihliuz gihgou doxgyaux gvaq，cungj deng bae giz dieg ceijdingh guh yihyoz gvanhcaz，caiqlij aeu gij banhfap wnq bae yawhfuengz baenzbingh.

text: Lingjdauj ganbu daegbied dwg gauhgiz ganbu bietdingh aeu gyagiengz gag haed、 siujsim doiqdaih mwh mbouj miz gamduk caeuq mwh banhsaeh saepsoiq, gagrox genjcaz caeuq gibseiz gaijcingq gij vwndiz youq ndaw hengzsawj gienzlig、 lenzcwng ginzcwng fuengmienh, guh daengz gij gienzlig ndaej hengzsawj de ciuq gveihcwz dengcingq hengzsawj, gij gienzlig wnggai youz gaepgwnz cujciz hengzsawj de gaeplaj cujciz mbouj ndaej hengzsawj, gij gienzlig wnggai youz lingjdauj banhswj cizdij hengzsawj de banhswj cwngzyenz goyinz mbouj ndaej gag hengzsawj, gij gienzlig mbouj wnggai youz swhgeij hengzsawj de cieddoiq mbouj ndaej hengzsawj.

text: Ciuhlaux roengzdaeuj, mbanj dou mbouj miz bouxlawz doegsaw ndaej dang hak gvaq, saw doeg daengz gaeuq yungh couh ndaej, lwgmbwk daengz seiz okhaq couh okhaq, lwgsai habseiz aeu yah couh aeu yah, lwgnyez lij dwg youq ranz guhhong ndei gvaq.” Hix miz vunz daeuj gienq Boh- daegcangh:“Seizneix mbouj rox saw, ok haw vunz mbouj nyiengh, lwg mwngz cij doeg di saw neix, lauheiq lauq ciuh gyoengqde bw.” Bohdaegcangh naeuz:“Miz ngaenz ndaw daehbaeuz, mbouj you gwn you daenj, danhfanz ra ndaej ngaenz, mbouj lau lauq ciuhvunz.” Youq Gvangjdungh aen gungh- cangj cibuh ndeu, aen gunghcangj neix miz bak lai boux vunzhong.

text: Boiqhab habdangq dwk doicaenh “seiq aen cienzmienh” canloz baijbouh, dwg aen fuengcim cwzloz moq ceihleix saeh guek dangj raeuz Cibbet Daih doxdaeuj dangj cunghyangh daj canloz dohsang saedyienh aen muzbyauh buekguh “song aen bak bi”、 saedyienh aen loqsiengj Cungguek--Cunghvaz Minzcuz daih fukhwng, cingjdaej suenqveh ndaw guek rog guek song aen daihbuenz, dawzndei gij fazcanj daegcwng moq guek raeuz cix doekdingh haenx, dwg aen canloz genjdingh laj seizdaih diuzgen moq doicaenh gaijgwz hailangh caeuq sevei cujyi yendaiva gensez、 genhciz caeuq fazcanj yiengh sevei cujyi miz Cungguek daegsaek.

text: Daegbied gangj daengz gij cwngzciu hungmbwk Dangj raeuz youq duenh neix lingjdauj yinzminz aeundaej haenx, doihaeuj le Cunghvaz Minzcuz baez bonghyat hungmbwk daj ndwn hwnjdaeuj daengz fouq hwnjdaeuj; Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj caeuq yinzminz Cungguek baengh yiengh gamj guh gamj buek yiemzrwd naeuz hawj daengx seiqgyaiq rox, gaijgwz hailangh dwg aen banhfap ceiq youqgaenj gietdingh yiengh ndeirwix baenzbaih ngoenzlaeng aen Cungguek ciuhneix, diuz roen sevei cujyi miz gij daegsaek Cungguek dwg diuz roen cingqdeng dazyinx Cungguek hwngfat hoenghhwd, Cungguek yamq hung gyaephwnj le seizdaih.

text: Daengxcungq dangjyenz itdingh aeu ciengzlwenx baujciz vunz Cungguek Gungcanjdangj youq mwh laeb dangj seiz cungj buekguh cingsaenz de, dawz giendingh lijsiengj saenqniemh daiq haeuj ndaw gunghcoz bonjfaenh bae, gagrox vih doicaenh hangh saehnieb yiengh seveicujyi miz Cungguek daegsaek bae haenqrengz guh saedcaiq guh, mwh hingz mwh swnh mbouj dasang mbouj ndaenggon, mwh nanz mwh mbouj swnh mbouj doeknaiq mbouj doenghngauz, naih ndaej gak cungj haenh gak cungj yaeuhlox, gingsouh ndaej gak cungj fung’yiemj caeuq diuhcan, ciengzlwenx baujciz cwngci bonjsaek boux vunz gungcanjdangj.

text: Caezgya nyinhnaeuz, youq laj hingzseiq moq yaek mbeguh yiemzsuk nyinhcaen ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz, gyagiengz ndaw dangj gamduk, gawq aeu ciepswnj caeuq fazyangz gij cienzdoengj ndei nem gihbwnj biucinj dangj raeuz youq ndaw ciengzgeiz saedguh cauxbaenz haenx, youh aeu giethab gij hingzseiq caeuq yinvu moq, youq ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz、 ndaw dangj gamduk lumjbaenz neiyungz fancouz、 fuengyiengq muzbyauh、 yenzcwz iugouz、 fuengfap roenloh daengj fuengmienh gaen hwnj seizdaih, doicaenh ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz caeuq ndaw dangj gamduk ciduva、 gveihfanva、 cwngzsiva bae.

text: Lozsiz dangjveij cangzveijvei roxnaeuz dangjcuj lwnhsaeh gveihcwz caeuq gezcwz cwngzsi, laebcienz aen cidu cangzveijvei yiengq cenzveijvei dinghgeiz baugau gunghcoz caiqlij ciepsouh cenzveijvei gamduk, giengiet fanjdoiq caeuq fuengzre gag dingh cix gaemh vun ciuq hengz roxnaeuz dan guenj swhgeij mbouj aeu gaepgwnz, giengiet fanjdoiq caeuq fuengzre ngeixlwnh daengzndwi mbouj guh gietdingh、 gietdingh daengzndwi mbouj bae caephengz、 caephengz daengzndw mbouj gangj saedyauq, giengiet fanjdoiq caeuq fuengzre aeu gij mingzdaeuz dangjveij cizdij gezcwz daeuj itheij famhfap.

title: Goj Yahvaiz
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
text: Yahvaiz gag rox de rieng raez , mbouj ndaej naengh daengq,couh naeuz:“Ayah,gou vunzlaux hangx some,mbouj ndaej naengh daengq law,naengh aen camjgaeq ndaej lo.”Yienghneix bouxbeix nod aen camjgaeq ma hawj de naengh.Duz yahvaiz naengh roengz camjgaeq bae le,diuz rieng de youq ndaw de baet ndaujndauq,gij gaeq ndaw de lek oxox. Boux baex doq cam naeuz:“Gaiq gijmaz youq ndaw caemjgaeq lo ,daiq?”Duz yahvaiz doq naeuz:”gaiq sauqbaet gou lo.” Boux beix caiq naeuz:“Ranz laep saengxsaengx,yiuq mbouj raen saek gaiq,daengj gou diemj daeng dwk lo,Daiq.” Duz yahcaiz han naeuz:“E!

text: Gak dieg gak bouhmonz gak fuengmienh cungj nyinhnaeuz, faenh gauj aen gezyi neix dwg gij cwngci senhyenz seizdaih moq vunz Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj rapmaenh diuz rap dawznduj、dingjmaenh caeuq hwngfat yiengh sevei cujyi miz gij daegsaek Cungguek, dwg aen hengzdoengh ceijnamz aeu lizsij guh gingq、haicauh ngoenzcog、guhbaenz Cunghvaz Minzcuz fukhwng hungmbwk ndeu, caeuq song aen lizsij gezyi gaxgonq Dangj raeuz gawq ciep goek ciep meg youh caeuq seizdaih caez baenaj, itdingh yaek gikcoi daengx Dangj youq gwnz roen moq baenaj seizdaih moq ceng’aeu gij mingzdaeuz engq hung.

text: Diuz roekcib caet Yienhgaep doxhwnj deihfueng yinzminz cwngfuj mizgven bouhmonz mbouj ciuq gij gvidingh aen fap neix bae hengzguh gij cizcwz fuengz yw binghlah caeuq guh ndei baujcang ne, youz doengzgaep yinzminz cwngfuj roxnaeuz gaepgwnz yinzminz cwngfuj mizgven bouhmonz minghlingh gaijcingq, doengbauq baebingz; cauhdawz binghlah cienzboq、 banhlah roxnaeuz miz yiengh hougoj yiemzcungh wnq ne, doiq bouxcawjguenj rap miz cwzyin caeuq boux rap miz cwzyin cigsoh de, ciuqfap guh hingzcwng cawqfaen; danghnaeuz cauxbaenz famhcoih, ciuqfap cazdawz hingzsaeh cwzyin.

text: Ngeih、Aen Gocwngz Dajgauj Faenh Gezyi Neix Bineix 3 nyied, Cunghyangh Cwngcigiz gietdingh, Baez Roek Cungh Daengxhoih Gaiq Cibgouj aen Dangj cungdenj yenzgiu aen vwndiz cienzmienh cungjgez gij cwngzciu hungloet caeuq gingniemh lizsij Dangj raeuz buekguh bak bi, laebbaenz aen cuj dajgauj vwnzgen, youz gou dang cujcangj, Vangz Huningz、Cau Lozci dungzci dang fucujcangj, mizgven bouxdaeuz Dangj caeuq guekgya nem mizgven bouxdaeuz cunghyangh bumwnz caeuq deihfueng camgya,youq Cunghyangh Cwngcigiz Cangzveijvei lingjdauj baihlaj rapdawz gaiq hong dajgauj vwnzgen.

text: Diuz hajcib haj Yienhgaep doxhwnj yinzminz cwngfuj veiswngh hingzcwng bumwnz youq mwh ciuq cizcwz bonjfaenh bae guh gamduk genjcaz， raen miz giz goekraemx vunzlai caez gwn yungh、 gijgwn caeuq gij doxgaiq doxgven deng goekbingh binghlah uqdawz， danghnaeuz mbouj gibseiz yungh cosih gaenjgip bae gaemhanh aiq yinxhwnj binghlah cienzboq、 banhlah， miz gienz hengzguh gij cosih laemzseiz bae fungsaek giz goekraemx vunzlai caez gwn yungh、 yocangz gijgwn caeuq gij doxgaiq mizgven roxnaeuz mboujcaengz guh gaicawx， caemhcaiq dawz de bae gienjniemh roxnaeuz siudoeg.

text: Dangj raeuz Cibbet Daih doxdaeuj, aen dangj cunghyangh aeu Siz Ginbingz dungzci guh haedsim haenx caenndang haenqrengz guh、 daiqdaeuz guh yienghndei, giendingh doicaenh cienzmienh coengz yiemz ceih dangj, genhciz swhsiengj laeb dangj caeuq cidu ceih dangj maedcaed giethab, doxgyoeb cwngjdun gij cozfungh aen dangj, yiemzhaenq fadceih nduknaeuh, guhseuq gij cwngci swnghdai ndaw dangj, gij cwngci swnghhoz ndaw dangj yienh’ok yienghsiengq moq, aeundaej le dangjsim minzsim, vih dangj caeuq guekgya haiok saednieb gizmen moq daezhawj le baujcwng youqgaenj.

chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: Bineix 2 nyied, Cunghyangh Cwngcigiz gietdingh, dangj raeuz Cibbet Gaiq Roek Cung Cienzhoih ciendaez yenzgiu aen vwndiz cienzmienh coengzyiemz ceih dangj, ceiqdingh doengh aen cunjcwz gvendaengz laj hingzseiq moq ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz, coihdingh 《Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Ndaw Dangj Gamduk Diuzlaeh Sawqhengz 》, laebbaenz aen cuj dajgauj vwnzgen, youz gou dang cujcangj, Liuz Yinzsanh、Vangz Gizsanh dungzci dang fucujcangj, mizgven bouhmonz caeuq deihfueng fucwz dungzci camgya, youz Cunghyangh Cwngcigiz Cangzveijvei lingjdauj bae guh hong dajgauj.

title: Cuenghhag
license_note: Wikipedia/dump text generally CC BY-SA; retain attribution
text: Cuenghhag gij yenhgiu neiyungz de gvangq dangqmaz, sezgiz daengz Bouxcuengh gij lizsij、yijyenz、cunghgyau、vwnzva、ginghci、vwnzyoz、yisuz、gyauyuz、cezyoz、minzsuz、sinhlij、yihyoz、gohgi、sevei sujsiz、sevei bencenh caeuq diegcuengh yendaiva gocwngz ndawde daez okdaeuj gij lijlun vwndiz caeuq sizcenj vwndiz de, gij yenhgiu fanveiz de hamjgvaq yinzvwnz gohyoz、sevei gohyoz caeuq mbangj swyenz gohyoz lingjyiz, goj naeuz Cuenghhag bauhamz liux Bouxcuengh sevei gij swnghcanjliz caeuq swnghcanj gvanhhi、ginghci gihcuj caeuq baihgwnz gencuz sojmiz neiyungz.

chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: Daih 22 diuz Yiemzgek caephengz aen cidu gaujcaz gaujhaed ganbu, cienzmienh gaujcaz binjdwz、 naengzlig、 guhhong、 niebcik、 cinghseuq daengj biujyienh, gawq yawjnaek cwngciz youh yawjnaek cwngdwz, cungdenj gaujcaz gvancez caephengz dangj cunghyangh caeuq gaepgwnz dangj cujciz gezcwz baijbouh biujyienh yiengh lawz, hengzguh guenj dangj ceih dangj cwzyin ndaej yiengh lawz, youq gwnz yenzcwz vwndiz hungnaek ndwnyouq aen lizcangz lawz, doiqdaih cungqvunz yinzminz ndei mbouj ndei, guh gij yinvu gaenj nanz yiemj naek de cingzgvang yiengh lawz.

chapter: Aen Fap Fuengz Yw Binghlah Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz
text: Diuz caetcib it Aen gihgvanh youq bien’gyaiq guh veiswngh cazniemh binghlah、 aen gihgou fuengzre doenghduz dawzraq mbouj ciuqfap hengzguh gij cizcwz doengbauq binghlah cingzgvang ne, youz mizgven bouhmonz ciuq gij cizcwz bonjfaenh bae hatheuh gaijcingq, doengbauq baebingz; cauhbaenz binghlah cienzboq、 banhlah roxnaeuz miz hougoj yiemzcungh wnq ne, doiq bouxcawjguenj rap miz cwzyin caeuq boux miz cwzyin cigsoh de, ciuqfap guh yiengh cawqfaen gyangqgaep、 siubae cizvu、 haicawz; cauxbaenz famhcoih ne, ciuqfap cazdawz hingzsaeh cwzyin.

text: Cungj nyinhnaeuz, faenh gauj aen gezyi neix daegdiemj ceiq sienmingz de dwg gangj saedsaeh、aeueiq lizsij, fanjyingj le diuz rap dawznduj Dangj raeuz buekguh bak bi, hab gij saehsaed lizsij; faenh gauj aen gezyi neix lwnhgangj caeuq bingzgyaq doengh gij saehgienh hungnaek、doengh aen hoih youqgaenj、doengh bouxvunz youqgaenj de，caeuq gij lwnhgangj caeuq gietlwnh ndaw gij lizsij vwnzyen Dangj raeuz gaenq miz haenx dox hamzciep, yienh’ok le Cibbet Daih aen Dangj doxdaeuj Dangjcunghyangh doiq gij lizsij Dangj raeuz miz nyinhrox moq.

text: Bietdingh aeu aeueiq gij cawjdaej diegvih dangjyenz、 baujcang gij minzcuj gienzleih dangjyenz, lozsiz dangjyenz gij gienzleih rox cingzgvang、 gienzleih caeuqfaenh、 gienzleih senjgij、gienzleih gamduk de, baujcang daengxcungq dangjyenz bingzdaengj yiengjmiz gij gienzleih dangjyenz ndaw dangjcangh gvidingh、 hengzguh gij yivu dangjyenz ndaw dangjcangh gvidingh, genhciz cungj dungzci gvanhaeh ndaw dangj minzcuj bingzdaengj, aen dangj cujciz lawz caeuq boux dangjyenz lawz cungj mbouj ndaej ciemqhaih gij minzcuj gienzleih dangjyenz.

text: Doengh aen cwngzsi laeb miz gih caeuq yienhgaep gij gihgou fuengzre gaemhanh baenzbingh de fucwz doeksaed gij gveihva、 fueng’anq fuengzre gaemhanh binghlah， cujciz hengzguh fuengzbingh、 siudoeg、 gaemhanh doengh duz lah bingh haih vunz， hawj bouxboux cungj rox gij cihsiz fuengz yw binghlah， fucwz gamcaek、 baugau bonjdieg binghlah cingzgvang， gamcaek、 baugau bonjdieg fwtfat gij goenggungh veiswngh saehgienh haenx， mbeguh liuzhingzbing’yoz diucaz，doiq gij bingh bonjdieg lai miz de cazniemh bing’yenz veizswnghvuz.

text: Diuz samcib ngeih Aen gihgou fuengzre gaemhanh baenzbingh giz sokruz、 gihcangz、 dietloh caeuq aen gihgvanh youq guekgyaiq cazniemh binghlah de youq mwh fatyienh boux dawz binghlah gyaploih、 boux raek goekbingh、 boux deng ngeiz dawz binghlah， wngdang ciuq guekgya mizgven gvidingh sikhaek youq giz henzguek goujan de， bauq hawj dangdieg aen gihgou fuengzre gaemhanh baenzbingh de roxnaeuz yienhgaep doxhwnj yinzminz cwngfuj veiswngh hingzcwng bumwnz， caemhcaiq heuh gij gihgou neix doxdoeng doxbauq.

text: Geij bi neix daeuj, dangj raeuz Cibbet Gaiq Sam Cung、 Seiq Cung、 Haj Cung Cienzhoih laebdaeb doiq cienzmienh gyalaeg gaijgwz、 cienzmienh ciuqfap ceih guek、cienzmienh hwnqbaenz aen biengz siujgangh guh le ciendaez yenzgiu, baez Roek Cung Cienzhoih neix caiq aeu ceiqdingh coihdingh song aen vwnzgengauj guh cungdenj ciendaez yenzgiu cienzmienh coengzyiemz ceih dangj, “seiq aen cienzmienh” canloz baijbouh couh cungj faenbied doenggvaq baez cunghyangh cienzhoih ndeu guh le yenzgiu caeuq baijbouh.

text: Gyonj daeuj gangj, dwg aeu ciuq gij iugouz cungjgez lizsij、gaemdawz gvilwd、giendingh saenqsim、byaij coh daengzcog neix, bae cungjgez ndei gij ginglig ronghlwenq Dangj raeuz byaij gvaq, cungjgez ndei gij cwngzciu ronghsag Dangj raeuz comzgiet daiqlingx yinzminz aeundaej, cungjgez ndei gij gingniemh dijbauj Dangj raeuz doihaeuj guh gwzming、gensez、gaijgwz, cungjgez ndei gij lijlun caeuq sizcen Cibbet Daih aen Dangj doxdaeuj saehnieb Dangj caeuq guekgya coh nanz roemx baenaj ndaej daengz haenx.

text: Aen gauj cunjcwz faen sam bouhfaenh、 12 aen fuengmienh：Daih’it bouhfaenh dwg vahnduj, gvihaeuj gyoeblwnh, lwnhgangj gij cozyung hungnaek caeuq lizsij gingniemh ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz、 gij vwndiz doedyienh ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz miz、 gij hingzseiq yinvu ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz bungzdaengz, daiq lienz gij youqgaenj youh gaenjbik laj hingzseiq moq gyagiengz caeuq gveihfan ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz, daezok gij muzbyauh iugouz gyagiengz caeuq gveihfan ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz.

text: Daih 7 diuz Ndaw dangj gamduk bietdingh aeu dingj gijliz youq baihnaj, yinhyungh gamduk ca gijliz “seiq cungj hingzdai”, ciengzseiz mbeguh bihbingz caeuq gag bihbingz、 iekdingh damzvah sij saenq cazcam, hawj “naj hoengz hanh conh” baenz ciengzseiz raen；dangjgij cawqfaen mbaeu、 cujciz diuzcingj bienqbaenz famh gijliz cawqleix ciemq dingzlai； dangjgij cawqfaen naek、diuzcingj cizvu hungnaek baenz siujsoq；famh gijliz deng ngeiz nangqdaengz famhfap laeb’anq saemjcaz baenz gig siujsoq.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Daej Daxboh

text: 6 aen cungdaeuz ndawde soengq daengz yihyen hung， youq yihyen hung guh aen soujsuz heuh guh “cihgya” he， cungj soujsuz neix mbouj suenq hung， hoeng doiq cungj bingh neix gig miz yungh， daxboh gou danghnaeuz fatbingh caengz gvaq 6 aen cungdaeuz ndaej guh cungj soujsuz neix， de caiq souh 5 bi cungj ndaej……Hoeng，haemh haenx daxboh fatbingh seiz mbouj heuh gou， mbwn rongh le gou youh mbouj daj dienhvah hawj 120， youh daiq daxboh bae aen cinjsoj haenx， nguh bae geijlai seizgan， haih？

text: Gyonjgangj le cib diuz gingniemh lizsij ndaej guhgoek caeuq dazyinx gyaenanz haenx, couh dwg dingjmaenh aeu Dangj lingjdauj、dingjmaenh yinzminz ceiq sang、dingjmaenh youq gwnz lijlun bae cauhmoq、dingjmaenh aeu doglaeb gag guhcawj、dingjmaenh aeu diuz roen Cungguek、dingjmaenh aeu ndaw sim miz lajmbwn、dingjmaenh aeu hailoh cauhmoq、dingjmaenh aeu gamj bae doucwngh、dingjmaenh dungjyiz cansen、dingjmaenh gag gaij bienq ndei.

text: Itdingh aeu genhciz dangjyenz bouxdog fugcoengz dangj cujciz, vunzsiuj fugcoengz vunzlai, baihlaj cujciz fugcoengz baihgwnz cujciz, daengx dangj gak aen cujciz caeuq daengxcungq dangjyenz fugcoengz dangj raeuz daengx guek daibyauj daihhoih caeuq cunghyangh veijyenzvei, haedsim dwg daengx dangj gak aen cujciz caeuq daengxcungq dangjyenz fugcoengz dangj raeuz daengx guek daibyauj daihhoih caeuq cunghyangh veijyenzvei.

text: Dangqnaj, 《Cunjcwz》 doiq raeuz yiemzsuk caeuq gveihfan gij cwngci swnghhoz ndaw dangj、 daihlig fazyangz gij cienzdoengj caeuq cozfungh ndei dangj raeuz, vanzlij miz yienhsaed cijdauj eiqngeih youqgaenj.”“30 lai bi daeuj, hingzseiq yinvu caeuq ndaw dangj cingzgvang fatseng le bienqvaq gig daih, aen dangj gensez gaenq cwkrom le daihliengh cwngzgoj moq gingniemh moq, youh bungzdaengz haujlai cingzgvang moq vwndiz moq.

chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: Cingj sou ngeixnaemj dwg mbouj dwg youq mwh seizgei habdangq youz cunghyangh doiq laj hingzseiq moq gyagiengz caeuq gveihfan ndaw dangj cwngci swnghhoz guh ok aen gietdingh ndeu, daezok iugouz moq.” 《Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Ndaw Dangj Gamduk Diuzlaeh Sawqhengz 》 daj 2003 nienz 12 nyied 31 hauh fatbouh saedhengz doxdaeuj, doiq gyagiengz ndaw dangj gamduk、 henhoh dangj raeuz doxgiet doengjit fazveih le cizgiz cozyung.

chapter: Cungguek Gungcanjdangj Daih Cibbet Gaiq Cunghyangh Veijyenzvei Daihroek Baez Daengxcungq Veiyi
text: It dwg ciepswnj caeuq fazyangz gij cienzdoengj ndei caeuq gingniemh dijbauj dangj raeuz, yunghrengz gvancez gij leixniemh moq、 swhsiengj moq、 canloz moq dangj raeuz Cibbet Daih doxdaeuj dangj cunghyangh daezok haenx, fanjyingj gij gingniemh moq、 guhfap moq dangj cunghyangh doicaenh cienzmienh coengzyiemz ceih dangj, caemhcaiq giethab saedguh moq daezok gvanhdenj moq、 guhfap moq, daejyienh seizdaih caeuq cauhmoq.

text: 9 nyied 6 hauh, gaengawq aen hoih Cunghyangh Cwngcigiz gietdingh, fatroengz faenh gauj cam’aeu yigen aen gezyi neix daengz itdingh fanveiz ndaw Dangj bae cam’aeu yigen, baudaengz cam’aeu gij yigen bouhfaenh dungzci laux ndaw Dangj, lij cienmonz dingqaeu le gij yigen doengh bouxdaeuz gak minzcuj dangjbai cunghyangh、Daengx Guek Gunghsanghlenz caeuq doengh boux daibyauj gyoengqvunz mizmingz mbouj haeuj dangjbai.

text: Haj diuz gyonjgangj neix, gawq hab gij saedsaeh gwnz dieg Cunghvaz, youh yawj daengz coglaeng vunzloih, yienh’ok le gij gvanhaeh Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj caeuq yinzminz Cungguek、Cunghvaz Minzcuz, yienh’ok le gij gvanhaeh Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj caeuq Majgwzswh cujyi、seiqgyaiq sevei cujyi、aen biengz vunzloih hwngfat, ronzdoeng le gij lizsij lozciz、lijlun lozciz、sizcen lozciz Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj buekguh bak bi.

title: Sinhcuz

text: Sinhcuz Si dieg youq Daizvanh baihsaebaek,gijgvangj dwg daihvanh daih caet hung,haeujvunz 40.8 fanh,dwg Sinhcuz ciqduhveigih haedsim cwngzsi.Laxlawz dwg ranz Boux Dokas.Bouxgun hai naz hai reih miz haehdungj youz 18 sigij co haihij,1733 nienz leabbean cwngz,1756 nienz Danqsuijdingh yij cuzcanj vih ci.Youz ciuhgonq daengj seizneix,Sinhcuz itloh dwg dangdieg hengzcwng cungsim.Seiq cawz duj raeuj, hab comzyouq.

chapter: Aen Gezyi Gvendaengz Gij Cwngzciu Hungloet Caeuq Gingniemh Lizsij Dangj Raeuz Buekguh Bak Bi Cunghgung Cunghyangh
text: Faenh gauj aen gezyi neix gyonjgangj coenz “gij eiqngeih lizsij Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj buekguh bak bi” de，cienzmienh、laegdaeuq、hidungj fanjyingj le Dangj raeuz doiq Cungguek、doiq vunzloih miz gij gunghawj ndaej geiq haeuj lizsij；gyonjgangj coenz “gij gingniemh lizsij Cunghgoz Gungcanjdangj buekguh bak bi” de，ronzdoeng lizsij、seizneix、daengzcog, yaek ndaej geiqhaeuj lizsij hungnaek、dazyinx seizneix youqgaenj.

text: Gak gaep dangj cujciz、 daengxcungq dangjyenz daegbied dwg lingjdauj ganbu itdingh aeu daezsang gij naengzlig guh ginzcung gunghcoz, geiq fugsaeh ginzcung youh daiqlingx ginzcung giendingh mbouj bienq bae gvancez lozsiz gij lijlun caeuq lohsienq fuengcim cwngcwz dangj raeuz, sawj dangj raeuz cujcangh bienqbaenz gij hengzdoengh ginzcung gagnyienh bae guh, dazyinx ginzcung dingq dangj gangj、 riengz dangj byaij.

text: Daengx Guek Yinzda、 Gozvuyen、 Daengx Guek Cwnghez, Cunghyangh Gijliz Genjcaz Veijyenzvei, Ceiqgauh Yinzminz Fazyen、 Ceiqgauh Yinzminz Genjcazyen, cunghyangh caeuq guekgya gihgvanh gak aen bumwnz, yinzminz ginhdui, gak aen yinzminz donzdij, gak aen deihfueng, gak aen giyez swyez danhvei、 sevei cujciz, doenghgij dangj cujciz neix cungj aeu caezcaezcienzcienz bae caephengz gij gezcwz baijbouh dangj cunghyangh.

text: Diuz seiqcib it Doiq aen ciengzsoj gaenq miz gij binglaeh cungj binghlah gyaploih roxnaeuz gij vunz youq giz daegdingh aen ciengzsoj neix， gizhaenx yienhgaep doxhwnj deihfueng yinzminz cwngfuj miz gienz gekliz gij vunz neix， caemhcaiq doengzseiz doengbauq hawj gaep yinzminz cwngfuj baihgwnz； aen yinzminz cwngfuj gaepgwnz ciep ndaej baugau le wngdang sikhaek gietdingh baecinj rox mbouj baecinj gekliz.

text: Demq ij dawz ij dawz,laeq de couh daj gwnz bam yiet di raemx roengz daeuj,guh dwg duz yahvaiz diemj feiz diemj mbouj dawz.Duz yahvaiz naemqnaeuz dwg duz meuz ok nyouh roengzdaeuj ,vanzlij ndaq geij gawq,doq ndaq doq heuh de roengz ma,“ Niq , roengz ma lo,Niq .” Duz yahvaiz cungj siengj coemj gwn boux beix de laem,couh cam boux beix de,“ Mwngz baenzlawz hwnj bae lo?” Boux beix naeuz:“Daj aenlae neix.

text: Daengx dangj itdingh aeu di ndeu cungj mbouj doenghngauz bae genhciz gaijgwz hailangh, fazveih ginzcung sien caux cingsaenz, daihdamj gaijcauh swhgeij, daihdamj bae doicaenh lijlun cauhmoq、 sizcen cauhmoq、 cidu cauhmoq、 vwnzva cauhmoq nem gizyawz gak fuengmienh cauhmoq, giendingh mbouj bienq bae saedhengz doiq rog hailangh gihbwnj gozcwz, nyengh mbouj ndaej onjdup youq yienhsaed、 gwq souj gij gaeuq.

text: Dangjyenz mbouj cinj cienzboq gij vah boihfamh lijlun caeuq lohsienq fuengcim cwngcwz dangj raeuz, mbouj cinj goenghai gangj gij vah boihfamh dangj cunghyangh gietdingh, mbouj cinj laeuh gij mimiz dangj caeuq guekgya okbae, mbouj cinj camgya gij cujciz mbouj habfap caeuq gij hozdung mbouj habfap, mbouj cinj biencaux、 cienzboq cwngci yauzyenz caeuq gangj gij vah coujva dangj caeuq guekgya hingzsieng.

text: Daih 17 diuz Ndaw dangj gamduk bietdingh aeu gyagiengz gamduk boux cujyau fucwz dangj cujciz caeuq boux lingjdauj ganbu aen gang’vih ceiq youqgaenj de, cungdenj gamduk cwngci lizcangz、 gyagiengz dangj raeuz gensez、coengzyiemz ceih dangj, caephengz gij gezyi dangj raeuz, goengdauh cingqbaiq genj vunz yungh vunz, rapdawz cwzyin、 cinghseuq gaghaed, doeksaed eiqsik hingzdai gunghcoz cwzyinci cingzgvang.

text: Dangjyenz、 ganbu itdingh aeu ciuqgoq daengxbuenz, gagrox henhoh sevei huzndei onjdingh, bungzdaengz gij vwndiz nangqdaengz leih’ik bonjfaenh caeuq gizbu leih’ik, wnggai doenggvaq cingqciengz miengloh fanjying hawj baihgwnz, cizgiz cujdung guh ndei vaqgej sevei mauzdun、 fangzgung sevei fung’yiemj gunghcoz, mbouj cinj cujciz、 camgya、 yungzhawj doenghgij hozdung mbouj habfap de gauj luenh sevei cizsi.

chapter: Aen Fap Fuengz Yw Binghlah Cunghvaz Yinzminz Gunghozgoz
text: Aen gihgou ywbingh wngdang doekdingh aen bouhmonz roxnaeuz boux vunz cienmonz bae rapdawz gij hong baugau binghlah yizcingz、 fuengzre、 gaemhanh gij binghlah bonj danhvei caeuq fuengzre gij binghlah bonjdieg； rapdawz yiengh hong gamcaek gij yinhsu yungyiemj youq mwh ywbingh caeuq youq ndaw yihyen deng lah de， caemhcaiq guh ancienz fuengzhoh、 siudoeg、 gekliz； rapdawz gij hong cawqceq nyapnyaj yihyen.

script: 现代标准壮文 Vahcuengh，拉丁字母拼写
title: Bouxcuengh

text: Cinz Swngminj gij bouxhag neix yenzgiu okdaeuj,Bouxcuengh dwg lwglan Sae'ou caeuq Lokvied duh Bakvied ciuhgonq,caeuq Bouxdaez youq Biengzdaez Daiqguek miz goek ndeu.Yenzgiu fatyienh,Bouxcuengh caeuq Bouxdaez youq gangjvah,hwnjranz,caeqbaiq miz dieg doxlumj lai.Lumjbaenz yenzgiu fatyienh,song cungj vah neix singmeh,yinhmeh cenghdi doxdoengz;youq 1000 aen saw geq,miz 75% doxdoengz roxnaeuz doxlumj.

text: Gangjmingz duenh neix gij hong youqgaenj Dangj raeuz bungz daengz, dwg laebdaeb ra aeu diuz roen cingqdeng hawj Cungguek gensez sevei cujyi, gaijfang caeuq fazcanj sevei swnghcanjliz, hawj yinzminz baet gungz duet hoj、vaiq di fouqmiz hwnjdaeuj, aeu yiengh dijci youh hoengh youh moq bae baujcingq、aeu yiengh hwngfat riengjvaiq guh vuzciz diuzgen hawj raeuz guhbaenz Cunghvaz Minzcuz fukhwng hungmbwk.

text: Gij dungxsaej ndaw ndang bouxvunz cungj dwg Yaemyiengz ndeu, doxbaengh youh dox doiqdingj.

text: Sawcuengh dwg saw gyoebyaem, yung lahdingh cihmeh guh cihmeh hingzsik, yungh Vahcuengh fanghyenz haihbaek guh goekdaej, aeu yaem Vahcuengh Vujmingz guh biucinj, dwg yinzminz cwngfuj youg 1956 nienz caux ok, 1957 nienz ginggvaq bihcinj youq dieg Bouxcuengh doihengz sawjyungh cunj dahit saujsu minzcuz vwnzsw ndeu.
